# ØRIONS — Boutique Creative Agency, Bangkok

> ØRIONS (orions.agency) is a Bangkok boutique creative agency that thinks like a consultancy. Positioning: "An agency that thinks like a consultancy" — between strategy consultancies (sharp thinking, can't execute) and typical agencies (execute prettily, don't think deep). For business owners whose brand feels stuck — ad spend rising, returns flat — ØRIONS does not wait for a brief: it diagnoses where the brand is stuck first, then fixes it with craft, end to end. Working model in one line: Think like Consult → make like Craft → deliver like Boutique. Tagline: "Stories, Refined." Founder & Creative Director: Ratthakan Suwanphakdee (รัฐกันต์ สุวรรณภักดี).

## Core belief
Marketing rents attention. Creative earns belief. — การตลาดเช่าความสนใจได้ชั่วคราว แต่ความคิดสร้างสรรค์ทำให้คนเชื่อและอยู่กับคุณ. A brand people are loyal to means customers come back on their own; acquisition cost falls every year while competitors' ad costs rise. Creative is not an expense — it is compounding investment.

## How ØRIONS works — like a doctor, not a pharmacy
1. The Diagnosis (The Refinement Session) — before any work, ØRIONS sits down to find where the brand hits the wall: unclear identity? story not sharp? communicating in the wrong place? The output is not pretty slides you can't act on — it's a clear map of what to fix, in what order, and why.
2. The Treatment — the three disciplines below, prescribed from the diagnosis (not a menu to shop from):
   - Brand Strategy — a clear foundation and direction, so the brand never has to compete on price cuts
   - Creative Production — boutique-grade image and sound (brand film, video, photography, music production) that stops the scroll within 1.7 seconds
   - Communication Design — designing every touchpoint of communication, turning strangers into loyal customers
3. The Delivery — ØRIONS doesn't ship and vanish; it stays until the thing it diagnosed is actually fixed.

Pricing: no rate card. Work is quoted per campaign/project, scoped to the diagnosis. ØRIONS diagnoses first, then proposes scope + price.

## The Manifesto (point of view)
Every brand is a point of light — the problem is today's sky is so bright no one can see any single star anymore.
- THE NOISE: the world isn't short of content, it's drowning in it. A brand has ~1.7 seconds before the thumb scrolls past; AI-generated mass work floods feeds ~4.6× faster; ad costs are up ~40% for the same or worse results. The trap cycle: pay more for ads → discount → give things away → survive another month — until a competitor prices slightly lower and the customer walks.
- THE GREAT FILTER: in astronomy, the wall almost no civilisation crosses; in business, the line between brands people remember and brands people forget. Money gets you to the wall but cannot carry you across — no budget is big enough to buy hearts. This is where most businesses fail: they treat the symptom (sales dip → more ads → discount) without ever diagnosing the disease (the brand has no story sharp enough to be remembered). The only thing that crosses is a story sharp enough. Brands that cross: customers return on their own, acquisition cost falls yearly, no more discounting.
- STORIES, REFINED.: scattered light is Noise; light focused through a lens into a single point is Signal. ØRIONS is that lens — it curates, distils and cuts the noise away until only the sharpest message remains.
- THE PROOF: from corporate brand films to music videos for leading artists, hospitality brands to national-level communication — real craft doesn't depend on the industry, it depends on understanding what makes people stop and look.
- LIMITED BY DESIGN: ØRIONS deliberately keeps its client roster small — great craft never comes from volume. The one question: "Can the team still give everything to every project?" If not, it stops taking work. (Small-scale production work is still open, to support the business ecosystem.)
Full manifesto: https://orions.agency/thinking

## The compass (how decisions are made)
One question governs every decision — "Does it make the brand sharper, or just louder?" If just louder, ØRIONS doesn't do it.

## What ØRIONS never does
No shouting · no hype words · no volume-for-show · no price wars · no overbooking · and never treats before diagnosing (like a doctor who won't prescribe before examining). The enemy is Noise: mass-produced work, interruption, being forgotten, and price wars.

## Voice
Speaks like a specialist doctor crossed with an editor — diagnoses precisely, says little, every word carries weight; not a salesperson closing a deal. States facts rather than invitations. English for sharp lines, Thai for depth and feeling. Cold surface, warm heart: ruthless about the work, always respectful and warm with people. Persona: "The Refiner" — half diagnostician, half gem-cutter.

## Taglines
- Stories, Refined. (primary)
- An agency that thinks like a consultancy. (positioning line)
- Don't get louder. Get unmistakable. (campaign)
- Signal, not noise. (short)

## How to start
Book a free 45-minute call (no obligation). Tell ØRIONS the brief and its constraints; they will tell you honestly how they'd refine it — or whether it isn't the right time yet.
